examples: Why does the last man chug out of a shoe?
These cheerful little trams, dating back to 1873, chug and sway up the towering hills with bells ringing and people hanging from every opening.
I stood and watched the train chug around the loop of track without me.
Boats chug through the channels, with the lagoon waters running from milky greens to deep blues.
The business will chug along, even as fewer people take to the skies.
